info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Activity Log Alerts API
info.description: API for Azure Activity Log Alert rules CRUD operations.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Activitylogalerts Activitylogalertname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Activity Log Alert rule.

request.description: Create a new Activity Log Alert rule or update an existing one.

response.name: An existing Activity Log Alert rule was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: A new Activity Log Alert rule was successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the Activity Log Alert rule could not be created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Activitylogalerts Activitylogalertname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Activity Log Alert rule.

request.description: Get an Activity Log Alert rule.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the Activity Log Alert rule could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Activitylogalerts Activitylogalertname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Activity Log Alert rule.

request.description: Delete an Activity Log Alert rule.

response.name: The Activity Log Alert rule was successfully deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The Activity Log Alert rule does not exist. It may have already been deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the Activity Log Alert rule could not be deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Activitylogalerts Activitylogalertname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Activity Log Alert rule.

request.description: Updates 'tags' and 'enabled' fields in an existing Alert rule. This method is used to update the Alert rule tags, and to enable or disable the Alert rule. To update other fields use CreateOrUpdate operation.

response.name: An existing Activity Log Alert rule was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Activitylogalerts

request.description: Get a list of all Activity Log Alert rules in a resource group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the list of Activity Log Alert rules could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Insights Activitylogalerts

request.description: Get a list of all Activity Log Alert rules in a subscription.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the list of Activity Log Alert rules could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
